title: Prohibits the manufacture, sale or distribution of Fixed Dose Combination of Pancreatin or Pancrelipase drugs for human_Section
description: Prohibits the manufacture, sale or distribution of Fixed Dose Combination of Pancreatin or Pancrelipase drugs for human_Section

(2) Fixed dose combination of Pancreatin or Pancielipasc containing amylase, protease and lipase with any other enzyme [F. No. X-11014/5/99-DMS & PFA] DEEPAK GUPTA, Jt Secy Foot Note :— Prmcipal Notification was published vide G.S.R. 578(E) dated 23-7-1983 and last amended vide G.S.R. No. 704(E) dated 20-10-1999.
